overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street at dusk. The player emerges from a covered walkway, proceeds along a busy street with holographic advertisements, turns at an intersection, and enters a corporate plaza with cyan and purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into brighter street lighting with visible sky
passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the concrete overpass, emerging onto the main street

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera under the overpass wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating deep shadow over the walkway
vertical strip of red illuminated warning lights on the left wall
tall structure displaying large pink circular holographic advertisement
green elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. As the camera moves forward, it emerges from the shadows into a futuristic city street at dusk, revealing towering holographic billboards and an elevated transit structure. A pedestrian passes by on the left as the camera approaches the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with elevated transit lines and holographic advertising

events.description: futuristic sedan with glowing accents drives past on the right side of the street
beginning to turn right at the intersection toward the corporate plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past holographic advertisements and street traffic, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street with headlights on

entered.detail: pink neon circular sign with geometric patterns mounted on a tall pillar
tall modern street light with illuminated vertical elements
zebra crossing with distinctive red and white striping

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open city street with full sky visibility, the camera passes futuristic vehicles and elaborate holographic billboards. The elevated transit structure dominates the upper portion of the view while neon advertisements illuminate the right side. The camera approaches a crosswalk and begins turning right at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with corporate plaza entrance

events.description: turning right at the intersection to cross the street
approaching the entrance to the softsys corporate building plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and crossing the street toward the corporate plaza entrance

notable_agents.action: futuristic olive-green SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: corporate building entrance with prominent cyan neon 'softsys' signage
tall modern glass building with vertical cyan lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, crossing the asphalt street marked with red and white crosswalk lines. A futuristic SUV passes through the intersection as the camera approaches the entrance to the softsys corporate plaza. The large holographic billboard remains visible in the distance to the left while the glass skyscraper rises on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with neon landscaping and holographic displays

events.description: entering the softsys corporate plaza from the street
moving deeper into the plaza where purple neon lighting dominates the environment

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty corporate plaza, passing illuminated reception desks and neon-lit planters

entered.detail: illuminated cyan reception desk with glowing 'softsys' logo
vertical purple neon light strips mounted on planters
large suspended screen displaying animated advertisements above the plaza
rectangular white planters containing small trees

segments.scene_description: Entering the softsys corporate plaza, the environment shifts to an enclosed space with artificial cyan and purple neon lighting. The camera walks past the glowing reception desk and illuminated planter boxes with vertical purple neon strips. The plaza is empty of people, featuring modern landscaping and a large overhead holographic screen displaying advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed urban underpass into the vibrant, neon-lit interior of a corporate plaza. It begins in a dimly lit covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass, moving forward until it emerges from the shadows into a futuristic city street at dusk filled with towering holographic billboards and an elevated transit structure. As the camera proceeds along the open street past futuristic vehicles, the view shifts toward a crosswalk where it turns right at an intersection, passing a futuristic SUV and a rising glass skyscraper. The scene then transitions from the open asphalt of the street into the enclosed softsys corporate plaza, where the lighting shifts to artificial cyan and purple tones. Finally, the camera glides past a glowing reception desk and illuminated planter boxes toward a large overhead holographic screen in the empty, modern space.
